module.maze.description:
### Tips
* Automatically farm the Paradox Maze – Verification Battlefield.
* Supports both Single Run and Repeat Run modes.
* Start from the maze entrance or the difficulty selection screen.
* Single Run mode is suitable for clearing the first three stages, while Repeat Run continuously farms the final stage.
* On the team setup screen, select buffs before starting the maze with Ankhasiya.
* Recommended buffs: Skill – Explosive Lightning, Shield – Seize.
* The team must include Chenxing – Qiongxian, placed in the center slot.
module.maze.title: Verification Battlefield
